title: DescribeFleetLocationUtilizationInput
description: DescribeFleetLocationUtilizationInput schema from Amazon GameLift API

allOf.description: A unique identifier for the fleet to request location utilization for. You can use either the fleet ID or ARN value.
The fleet location to retrieve utilization information for. Specify a location in the form of an Amazon Web Services Region code, such as us-west-2.
